title: lithocarpus fissus
intro: Lithocarpus fissus, also known as the canyon live oak, is a species of evergreen tree that belongs to the beech family, Fagaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus fissus include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cardiovascular health, and boost the immune system. The herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to reap its medicinal benefits.
